text:
# Nationwide & VM Showcase  
Nov 20 2025  
Agenda  
1. Introduction and Nationwide Overview - KP
2. Virgin Money - Vera
3. Cloud, Digital & Integration – Sam H
4. Data & Functions - Holly
5. Customer Servicing – Tim & Peter
6. Mortgages - Duncan
7. Integration - Tim  
1. Data & Functions Portfolio Overview
2. Teradata Migration case study
3. Demo
4. Gen AI case study  
4  
Nationwide and IBM confidential   |    © 2024 IBM Corporation

2025 Key Successes  
2026 Priorities

name: Chunk 1/7

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major UK building society and financial services provider acting as the primary client for the showcased IBM solutions. The document positions Nationwide as a key strategic account undergoing significant data, HR, and AI modernisation initiatives, with IBM serving as a central systems integrator and delivery partner.
context: Delivered Nationwide’s new Oracle Cloud HR Recruitment Platform on time and on budget
Won and leading Nationwide HR integration on Oracle HCM, progressing to plan for Mar 2026 go-live

raw_entities.name: Virgin Money
raw_entities.description: A UK-based financial services provider and strategic partner client undergoing parallel data, migration, and integration modernisation. The collateral highlights IBM's role in centralising migration utilities and integrating Virgin Money's NBS HR systems alongside Nationwide's broader digital transformation.
context: At the centre of integrating VM NBS HR

raw_entities.name: D&F Portfolio
raw_entities.description: A consolidated portfolio of data, functions, and integration services managed by IBM for the client. It encompasses migration utilities, HR system integration, AI strategy, and automation platforms, serving as the overarching delivery framework for 2025 successes and 2026 priorities.

raw_entities.name: Teradata Migration
raw_entities.description: A structured data platform migration initiative designed to decommission legacy Teradata infrastructure. The solution leverages IBM accelerators to accelerate the exit process and is highlighted as a key 2026 priority and a documented case study for the client.

raw_entities.name: SQL Databricks Migration
raw_entities.description: A modern data platform migration programme focused on transitioning SQL workloads to Databricks. IBM is positioned as owning the DBT Databricks framework to simplify SQL processes and drive data modernisation across the client's landscape.
context: Owning DBT Databricks in SQL Simplification

raw_entities.name: VMI Migration Utility
raw_entities.description: A centralised migration utility solution tasked with standardising and streamlining data and system migrations for Virgin Money. It serves as a foundational component supporting broader VM integration efforts and data automation initiatives.
context: Tasked with central Migration Utility for the VM Integration

raw_entities.name: HR Systems Integration
raw_entities.description: A targeted integration programme focused on aligning and modernising Human Resources systems. IBM is leading the integration of Virgin Money's NBS HR and delivering Nationwide's Oracle Cloud HR Recruitment Platform, positioning itself at the centre of this functional transformation.
context: At the centre of integrating VM NBS HR

raw_entities.name: GenAI CoE & Strategy
raw_entities.description: A governance and strategy framework establishing a Centre of Excellence for Generative AI and Agentic workflows. It encompasses driving AI strategy, operating models, horizon planning, and the production scaling of enterprise use cases across the client's organisation.
context: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic
Driving AI strategy, operating model and horizon plans – use and creation of assets

raw_entities.name: Customer Experience Platform Automation
raw_entities.description: An automation-focused offering designed to enhance customer-facing interactions and servicing workflows. It is listed as a key capability area alongside IT Ops Automation and FinCrime & Data Gov, indicating a focus on digital customer journey modernisation.

raw_entities.name: FinCrime & Data Gov
raw_entities.description: A compliance and governance solution addressing financial crime prevention and data governance requirements. It is positioned as a core functional area within the broader D&F portfolio, supporting regulatory adherence and secure data handling.

raw_entities.name: ICA Deployment
raw_entities.description: A deployment initiative focused on implementing ICA (likely Internal Capital Adequacy or a specific integration component) across the client's infrastructure. It is listed as a 2026 priority alongside data federation and IT operations.

raw_entities.name: Strategic Partner for AI & Modern Data Platforms
aliases: Strategic Partner for AI & Modern Data Platforms
raw_entities.description: A high-level delivery capability positioning IBM as the trusted strategic partner for architecting and implementing AI and modern data platforms. This capability underpins the entire portfolio, enabling seamless integration, migration, and scaling of enterprise-grade solutions.
context: Strategic Partner for AI & Modern Data Platforms

raw_entities.name: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic
aliases: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic
raw_entities.description: A systems integration capability establishing IBM as the primary integrator for Generative AI and Agentic workflows. This capability enables the delivery of next-generation AI use cases, pathfinders, and enterprise-scale automation across the client's landscape.
context: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic

raw_entities.name: Delivering Teradata Exit with Accelerators
raw_entities.description: A specialised migration capability leveraging proprietary accelerators to expedite the decommissioning of legacy Teradata systems. This capability reduces migration risk, accelerates timeline delivery, and supports the broader data modernisation agenda.

raw_entities.name: Driving AI Strategy and Operating Model
aliases: Driving AI strategy, operating model and horizon plans
raw_entities.description: A strategic advisory and operational capability focused on defining AI roadmaps, operating models, and horizon planning. It encompasses the creation and scaling of enterprise AI assets, ensuring alignment with long-term business objectives.
context: Driving AI strategy, operating model and horizon plans – use and creation of assets

raw_entities.name: Production & Scaling of Enterprise Use Cases
aliases: Production & scaling of enterprise use cases
raw_entities.description: An operational capability focused on transitioning AI and automation use cases from pilot to production environments. It enables the scaling of enterprise-grade solutions such as Complaints & QA Assist and supports the Agentic pathfinder roadmap.
context: Production & scaling of enterprise use cases – Complaints & QA Assist

raw_entities.name: Complaints & QA Assist
raw_entities.description: A specific customer experience use case leveraging AI to automate complaint handling and quality assurance processes. It represents a production-scale enterprise application being developed and scaled as part of the Gen AI CoE strategy.

raw_entities.name: Oracle Cloud HR Recruitment Platform
raw_entities.description: A modernisation use case involving the deployment of an Oracle Cloud-based HR recruitment platform. The solution has been delivered on time and on budget, serving as a foundational component for broader HR systems integration.
context: Delivered Nationwide’s new Oracle Cloud HR Recruitment Platform on time and on budget

raw_entities.name: Teradata Migration case study
raw_entities.description: A documented migration use case demonstrating the successful execution of a Teradata platform exit. It serves as a proof point for IBM's migration accelerators and data modernisation capabilities.

raw_entities.name: Gen AI case study
raw_entities.description: A documented Generative AI use case highlighting the practical application of AI technologies within the client's environment. It is presented as a key demonstration asset to showcase AI strategy and production scaling capabilities.

raw_entities.name: On Time and On Budget Delivery
raw_entities.description: A quantified delivery benefit demonstrating strict adherence to project timelines and financial constraints. This outcome validates IBM's project management discipline and cost-control capabilities in executing complex HR platform deployments.
context: Delivered Nationwide’s new Oracle Cloud HR Recruitment Platform on time and on budget

raw_entities.name: Progressing to Plan for Mar 2026 Go-Live
aliases: progressing to plan for Mar 2026 go-live
raw_entities.description: A schedule adherence benefit indicating that the HR integration programme is tracking successfully toward a March 2026 production launch. This demonstrates reliable delivery velocity and effective milestone management.
context: progressing to plan for Mar 2026 go-live

raw_entities.name: Teradata
raw_entities.description: A legacy enterprise data warehouse platform targeted for decommissioning. The client is executing a Teradata exit strategy, leveraging IBM's migration accelerators to transition workloads to modern data platforms.

raw_entities.name: Databricks
raw_entities.description: A modern cloud-based data and AI platform serving as the target environment for SQL and data migration workloads. IBM is owning the DBT Databricks framework to simplify SQL processes and drive data modernisation.
context: Owning DBT Databricks in SQL Simplification

raw_entities.name: Oracle Cloud
raw_entities.description: A cloud-based enterprise software platform hosting HR and recruitment systems. It is the underlying infrastructure for the delivered Oracle Cloud HR Recruitment Platform and the broader Oracle HCM integration programme.

raw_entities.name: DBT
raw_entities.description: A data transformation framework used within the Databricks ecosystem to manage SQL transformations. IBM is positioned as owning and managing this framework to simplify SQL workflows and support data modernisation efforts.
context: Owning DBT Databricks in SQL Simplification

raw_entities.name: SQL
raw_entities.description: A standard query language used across the client's data landscape. The collateral highlights a focus on SQL simplification and migration, indicating a need to reduce complexity and improve data accessibility.

raw_entities.name: Gen AI
raw_entities.description: A category of artificial intelligence technologies focused on generative capabilities. It is central to the client's AI strategy, with IBM serving as the primary systems integrator for deploying and scaling Gen AI use cases.
context: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic

raw_entities.name: Agentic
raw_entities.description: An advanced AI technology category focusing on autonomous, goal-oriented agents. It represents the next evolution in the client's AI roadmap, with IBM leading pathfinder initiatives and enterprise-scale production deployments.
context: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic

raw_entities.name: Accelerators
raw_entities.description: Proprietary tools and frameworks designed to accelerate migration and modernisation projects. These accelerators reduce delivery timelines and mitigate risk, serving as a key competitive advantage in executing the Teradata exit.

raw_entities.name: Strategic Partner Status
aliases: Strategic Partner for AI & Modern Data Platforms
raw_entities.description: A formalised partnership positioning that distinguishes IBM as a trusted strategic advisor rather than a transactional vendor. This status enables deeper access to client roadmaps, co-creation of AI assets, and leadership in complex integration programmes.
context: Strategic Partner for AI & Modern Data Platforms

raw_entities.name: Primary Systems Integrator (SI) Role
aliases: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic
raw_entities.description: A delivery model differentiator establishing IBM as the lead systems integrator for AI and Agentic workloads. This role consolidates responsibility for end-to-end integration, scaling, and productionisation of enterprise AI use cases.
context: Primary SI for Gen AI and Agentic

raw_entities.name: KP
raw_entities.description: A key presenter or stakeholder responsible for the Nationwide overview segment of the showcase. Likely represents IBM leadership or account management, providing strategic context for the client relationship.

raw_entities.name: Vera
raw_entities.description: A presenter or stakeholder focused on the Virgin Money segment. Likely represents IBM delivery, account management, or client-side leadership overseeing VM-specific initiatives.

raw_entities.name: Sam H
raw_entities.description: A presenter or stakeholder leading the Cloud, Digital & Integration segment. Likely represents IBM technical leadership or solution architecture driving cloud and integration strategies.

raw_entities.name: Holly
raw_entities.description: A presenter or stakeholder responsible for the Data & Functions overview. Likely represents IBM data engineering or analytics leadership overseeing portfolio priorities and modernisation efforts.

raw_entities.name: Tim
raw_entities.description: A presenter or stakeholder involved in both the Integration and Customer Servicing segments. Likely represents IBM integration delivery or customer experience leadership driving automation and platform modernisation.

raw_entities.name: Peter
raw_entities.description: A presenter or stakeholder co-leading the Customer Servicing segment. Likely represents IBM customer experience or automation delivery supporting the client's servicing transformation.

raw_entities.name: Duncan
raw_entities.description: A presenter or stakeholder focused on the Mortgages segment. Likely represents IBM domain expertise or solution delivery supporting mortgage-specific data and automation initiatives.

raw_entities.name: IBM Corporation
raw_entities.description: The primary selling organisation and solution provider referenced in the collateral. IBM is positioned as the strategic partner, systems integrator, and technology vendor delivering data, AI, and migration solutions to the client.

raw_entities.name: Nationwide & VM Showcase
raw_entities.description: A scheduled client-facing presentation or internal showcase event dated November 20, 2025. The event serves as a platform to present IBM's D&F portfolio, 2025 successes, 2026 priorities, and live demonstrations of migration and AI use cases.
